title: Font Coded Graphic Character Set Global Identifier (0x20)
description: Layout for triplet 0x20: Tlength, Tid, GCSGID and CPGID fields as defined in the MO:DCA table.
notes: Offsets in this layout are relative to the triplet start. The UBIN Tlength at offset 0 indicates the triplet length. Tid at offset 1 should be 20 for this triplet.

elements.name: GCSGID
elements.description: Graphic Character Set Global Identifier (CODE, 2 bytes). Specifies the GCS global identifier or the character set when value FFFF indicates code page.

elements.name: CPGID
elements.description: Code Page Global Identifier (CODE, 2 bytes). Specifies the code page global identifier.
